Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETCODEMP' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETCODEMP' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETCODEMP' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Remessa Retorno' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "Contém") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "Contém") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "Contém") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &AuxEmpCod = EmpCod &AuxCbrCod = RemRetCbrCod Do 'GetLocalCobranca' &GridHibrido = &IsImprime /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Download.FromImage(ActionExportFile) &Download.TooltipText = "Baixar Arquivo" &Imprimir = !'' If (&GridHibrido = True) &Imprimir.Class = !'Attribute' Else &Imprimir.Class = !'Invisible' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWGeraCobranca.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSetwwSaldos' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWSaldo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSetwwretorno' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWRemessa.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RemRetCodEmp1.Visible = False &RemRetNomEmp1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersRemRetDta1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &RemRetCodEmp1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &RemRetNomEmp1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersRemRetDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RemRetCodEmp2.Visible = False &RemRetNomEmp2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersRemRetDta2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &RemRetCodEmp2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &RemRetNomEmp2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersRemRetDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RemRetCodEmp3.Visible = False &RemRetNomEmp3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersRemRetDta3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &RemRetCodEmp3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &RemRetNomEmp3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersRemRetDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &RemRetCodEmp2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &RemRetCodEmp3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETCODEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &RemRetCodEmp1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &RemRetNomEmp1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETDTA' &RemRetDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &RemRetDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETCODEMP' AND not &RemRetCodEmp1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetCodEmp1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' AND not &RemRetNomEmp1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetNomEmp1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'REMRETDTA' AND not (&RemRetDta1.IsEmpty() AND &RemRetDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &RemRetDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETCODEMP' AND not &RemRetCodEmp2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetCodEmp2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' AND not &RemRetNomEmp2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetNomEmp2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'REMRETDTA' AND not (&RemRetDta2.IsEmpty() AND &RemRetDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &RemRetDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETCODEMP' AND not &RemRetCodEmp3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetCodEmp3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETNOMEMP' AND not &RemRetNomEmp3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetNomEmp3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'REMRETDTA' AND not (&RemRetDta3.IsEmpty() AND &RemRetDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RemRetDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &RemRetDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"RemessaRetorno" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &Download.Click RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&SdtConfiguracoesPasta) &DtatoC = padL(str(day(RemRetDta)),2,'0')+padL(str(Month(RemRetDta)),2,'0')+trim(str(Year(RemRetDta))) &NomArq = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+&DtatoC+'.ret' &file.Source = &NomArq If &file.Exists() &file.Delete() EndIf &ResultadoAbertura = DfwOpen(&NomArq,'','', 0, 'ISO-8859-1') &ResultadoNext = dfwptxt(RemRetTxt) // Grava Linha &ResultadoNext = DFWNext() &ResultadoAbertura = dfwclose() &link = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+&DtatoC+'.ret' link(&link) EndEvent Event &Imprimir.Click &SdtBaixadeRemessa.FromJson(Trim(RemRetSdtJson)) Msg(RemRetSdtJson) If &SdtBaixadeRemessa.Count > 0 &WEBSESSION.Set('Retorno_cobranca', &SdtBaixadeRemessa.ToJson()) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS038.Link(EmpCod, 0) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção", "Nenhum Retorno Encontrado.", DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True, "")) Endif EndEvent Sub 'GetLocalCobranca' &IsImprime = False For Each Order EmpCod, CbrCod Where EmpCod = &AuxEmpCod Where CbrCod = &AuxCbrCod If CbrTipBol = TipoBoleto.Hibrido &IsImprime = True EndIf Exit EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
